name: io.consentease/mcp-server
description: Manage ConsentEase consent banners, cookies, and consent records from your coding agent.

environmentVariables.name: CONSENTEASE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ConsentEase API key (ce_live_…). Create one in the dashboard under Settings → API Keys.

environmentVariables.name: CONSENTEASE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: ConsentEase origin (no /api/v1 suffix). Defaults to the live production API; only set this to target a local/dev server.
